reviews.comment:
Parada obligada, cuando vas en la ruta, excelente lugar muy limpio buena comida, hay un patio de comidas de parrillada, lo único malo es que no tienen la aplicación de YPF, por eso resto una estrella, el resto excelente!!

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop when you're on the road, excellent place, very clean, good food, there's a grilled food court. The only downside is that they don't have the YPF app, hence the one star, otherwise excellent!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5a3N2QWNnEAE
